---
title: "Resume"
---

**[www.linkedin.com/in/jackson-ham](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jackson-ham)**

## Education

**Brigham Young University - Idaho**
Bachelor of Science in Finance | Minor in Accounting | Certificate in Data Science
Anticipated: Mar 2028 | GPA: 3.7
Relevant Courses: Financial Accounting, Business Fundamentals, Business Statistics

## Experience

**Blackridge Industries — Framing & Concrete Specialist**
*Rexburg, Idaho | Apr 2025 – Sep 2025*

- Collaborated with a team of 2-10 tradespeople to pour, level, and finish concrete foundations, slabs, and sidewalks to meet tight project deadlines and quality standards
- Trained new crew members on framing systems, formwork techniques, and equipment safety, resulting in 0 on-site incidents
- Operated heavy equipment such as power saws, nail guns, and telescopic handlers

## Volunteer Experience

**The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints — Full-Time Volunteer Representative**
*Toronto, Ontario, Canada | Nov 2022 – Dec 2024*

- Helped hundreds of individuals reach spiritual goals by developing and implementing lesson plans and strategies

## Skills

**Technical:** Excel, GAAP, SQL, Python
**Soft Skills:** Self-motivated, Leadership, Collaboration

## Projects

- Analyzed 7 publicly traded tech stocks (including Apple, NVIDIA, and Microsoft) using Excel's STOCKHISTORY and XLOOKUP functions to evaluate 10-year price trends, volatility, and risk-adjusted returns
- Synthesized findings into a ranked investment recommendation supported by 8 dynamic charts and a dropdown company comparison dashboard

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2026 -->
